## Summary

<!-- Describe the change and why it is needed. -->

## Verification

<!-- Mark the checks that are relevant for this change. CI runs lint, tests, and smoke on push/PR. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` or CI smoke is sufficient for this change

## Notes

- [ ] No real secrets, production credentials, API keys, or private tokens are added to code, docs, tests, logs, or fixtures.
- [ ] Preview or LAN exposure changes document the auth and port-binding impact.
- [ ] README, `.env.example`, or other docs are updated when user-facing config or workflows change.
